Complete: "Have you ever ___ to Europe?"
What phrase describes an exciting travel memory?
How do you ask a friend about their trip?
Complete: "I ___ a wonderful time during my vacation."

description: Email phrases darsi bo'yicha test.

questions.text: How do you start a formal email?
How do you end a formal email politely?
Which phrase is used to ask for information in an email?
Which subject line is appropriate for a work email?
What should you check before sending an email?

description: Writing a request email darsi bo'yicha test.

questions.text: Which phrase is used to make a polite request in an email?

choices.text: "Could you please send me the report?"

questions.text: Complete: "I am writing to ___ about the schedule."
Which closing phrase fits a request email?
What should a request email include?
Complete: "I would appreciate it if you could ___ this by Friday."

description: Replying to emails darsi bo'yicha test.

questions.text: How do you start a reply email?
Which phrase confirms you received an email?
How do you politely decline a request by email?

choices.text: "Unfortunately, I am unable to help at this time."

questions.text: Which phrase is used to confirm an appointment?
How should you close a reply email politely?

description: Making a call darsi bo'yicha test.

questions.text: How do you politely answer the phone?
What do you say to ask who is calling?
How do you ask to speak to someone?
What do you say if the person is unavailable?
How do you end a phone call politely?

description: Leaving a message darsi bo'yicha test.

questions.text: How do you leave a message politely?

choices.text: "Could you please tell him I called?"

questions.text: What information should you leave in a message?

choices.text: your name and reason for calling

questions.text: How do you ask someone to return your call?

choices.text: "Could you ask him to call me back?"

questions.text: Which phrase confirms you took a message?
How do you spell your name on the phone if unclear?

description: Conference calls darsi bo'yicha test.

questions.text: How do you start a conference call?
What do you say if you can't hear someone clearly?
How do you introduce yourself in a conference call?

choices.text: "Hi, this is Aziz from the marketing team."

questions.text: What might you say to end a conference call?

choices.text: "Thank you all, let's follow up by email."

questions.text: What should you do before speaking in a conference call?

choices.text: mute/unmute appropriately and wait your turn

description: Ending a call politely darsi bo'yicha test.

questions.text: How do you politely end a business call?
Which phrase signals you need to finish the call?

choices.text: "I'm afraid I have to go now."

questions.text: How do you thank someone for calling?
Which phrase offers to help further?

choices.text: "Please let me know if you need anything else."

questions.text: How do you confirm next steps before ending a call?

choices.text: "So, we agreed to meet on Friday, correct?"

description: Meeting vocabulary darsi bo'yicha test.

questions.text: What do you call a list of topics discussed in a meeting?
What do you call written notes of what was discussed in a meeting?
Who usually leads a meeting?
What does it mean to "table an item" in a meeting?

choices.text: to put it on a table physically

questions.text: What do colleagues do at the start of a meeting?

choices.text: greet each other and review the agenda

description: Running a meeting darsi bo'yicha test.

questions.text: How do you start a meeting professionally?
How do you ask for everyone's opinion in a meeting?
How do you politely interrupt in a meeting?
How do you summarize decisions at the end of a meeting?
How do you politely move to the next topic?

choices.text: "Let's move on to the next point."

description: Giving a presentation darsi bo'yicha test.

questions.text: How do you start a presentation?

choices.text: "Good morning, today I will talk about..."

questions.text: What do you use to show information visually in a presentation?
How do you ask for questions at the end?
How do you transition between presentation points?

choices.text: "Now, let's move on to the next point."

questions.text: How do you conclude a presentation?

description: Discussing ideas darsi bo'yicha test.

questions.text: How do you politely express disagreement with an idea in a meeting?

choices.text: "I see your point, but I have a different view."

questions.text: How do you suggest a new idea professionally?

choices.text: "What if we tried a different approach?"

questions.text: How do you build on someone else's idea?

choices.text: "That's a great point, and we could also..."

questions.text: How do you ask others to share their thoughts on an idea?
How do you express enthusiasm about an idea?

description: Writing a CV darsi bo'yicha test.

questions.text: What does "CV" stand for?
What should a CV include?
What is a "cover letter"?

choices.text: a letter explaining why you want the job

questions.text: What should you list under "skills" on a CV?

choices.text: relevant abilities like languages or software

questions.text: Why is it important to tailor your CV for each job?

choices.text: to highlight relevant skills for that specific role

description: Job interview phrases darsi bo'yicha test.

questions.text: What is a common interview question?
How do you describe your strengths in an interview?
How do you answer "Why do you want this job?"

choices.text: "I am passionate about this field and your company's mission."

questions.text: What should you do at the end of an interview?

choices.text: thank the interviewer and ask questions

questions.text: How do you describe a weakness professionally?

choices.text: "I sometimes focus too much on details, but I'm working on it."

description: Talking about experience darsi bo'yicha test.

questions.text: How do you describe past work experience?

choices.text: "I worked as a sales assistant for two years."

questions.text: Complete: "I ___ responsible for managing the team."
How do you describe an achievement at work?
How do you talk about skills gained from a past job?
Complete: "In my previous role, I ___ a team of five."

description: Salary negotiation darsi bo'yicha test.

questions.text: How do you politely ask about salary in an interview?

choices.text: "What is the salary range for this position?"

questions.text: How do you respond if offered a lower salary than expected?
What should you research before negotiating salary?

choices.text: average salary for the role and industry

questions.text: How do you professionally counter a salary offer?

choices.text: "Based on my experience, I was hoping for a higher salary."

questions.text: What is important during salary negotiation?

description: Form completion strategies darsi bo'yicha test.

questions.text: In IELTS Listening Section 1, what type of conversation usually appears?

choices.text: an everyday dialogue, like booking or registration

questions.text: What should you do before the audio starts in a form-completion task?

choices.text: read the form and predict the information needed

questions.text: What type of information is usually missing in form completion tasks?
Why is spelling important in IELTS Listening form completion?

choices.text: incorrect spelling can mark the answer wrong
you only need the first letter
you can write in any language

questions.text: What is a good strategy for form completion tasks?

choices.text: listen for keywords near the gaps

description: Numbers and spelling darsi bo'yicha test.

questions.text: Why is it important to practice numbers in IELTS Listening?

choices.text: numbers like phone numbers and dates are commonly tested
numbers never appear in the test

questions.text: How is the number "0" sometimes pronounced in phone numbers?
What should you listen for carefully with similar-sounding numbers?
When spelling a name, what might the speaker do?

choices.text: write it on a board only

questions.text: What is a useful strategy when listening for numbers?

choices.text: write down numbers immediately as you hear them
wait until the end to write anything

description: Map labeling darsi bo'yicha test.

questions.text: What does a map labeling task require you to do?

choices.text: identify locations on a map based on audio descriptions
write an essay about the map

questions.text: What should you do before the audio starts in a map task?

choices.text: study the map and locate key landmarks

questions.text: Which words are important for understanding directions in map tasks?
What is a common challenge in map labeling tasks?

choices.text: following directions while listening at the same time

questions.text: What should you do with letters or numbers on the map?

choices.text: match them to the correct locations mentioned in the audio

description: Following directions darsi bo'yicha test.

questions.text: What does a "following directions" task in IELTS Listening test?

choices.text: your ability to track movement based on spoken instructions

questions.text: Which word indicates a change in direction?
What is a key skill needed for following directions tasks?

choices.text: staying focused and tracking the path as you listen

questions.text: What should you do if you miss a direction?

choices.text: keep listening and try to catch up using context

questions.text: Which phrase might indicate you have reached a destination?

description: Academic discussion darsi bo'yicha test.

questions.text: What type of audio is common in Section 3 of IELTS Listening?

choices.text: a discussion between students and a tutor

questions.text: What skill is important when multiple speakers discuss a topic?

choices.text: only listening to the loudest voice

questions.text: What does "academic discussion" usually involve?

choices.text: students or experts discussing a study-related topic

questions.text: Why is taking notes useful during an academic discussion?

choices.text: it helps you remember details for the questions

questions.text: What might you be asked to do after an academic discussion audio?

choices.text: match opinions to the correct speaker
write a song about the topic

description: Lecture comprehension darsi bo'yicha test.

questions.text: What is the format of Section 4 in IELTS Listening?

choices.text: a single academic lecture by one speaker
a phone call to a hotel

questions.text: Why is Section 4 considered more challenging?

choices.text: it uses more academic vocabulary and longer monologues
it is shorter than other sections

questions.text: What strategy helps with lecture comprehension?

choices.text: listening for signal words like 'firstly' or 'in contrast'

questions.text: What type of questions are common in Section 4?
Why is predicting vocabulary before listening helpful in Section 4?

choices.text: it helps you anticipate what type of word fits each gap
prediction is not useful at all
it replaces the need to listen

description: Skimming strategies darsi bo'yicha test.

questions.text: What is "skimming" in IELTS Reading?

choices.text: reading quickly to get the general idea

questions.text: Why is skimming useful before answering questions?

choices.text: it helps you understand the overall structure quickly
it replaces the need to read at all

questions.text: What should you skim first in an IELTS Reading passage?

choices.text: the title, headings, and first sentences of paragraphs

questions.text: How much time should you typically spend skimming a passage?

choices.text: a short time, just to get the gist
more time than reading in detail

questions.text: What is the main goal of skimming?

choices.text: to understand the general topic and structure

description: Scanning for keywords darsi bo'yicha test.

questions.text: What is "scanning" in IELTS Reading?

choices.text: searching quickly for specific information or keywords

questions.text: What should you do before scanning for an answer?

choices.text: identify the keyword in the question
read the entire passage word by word

questions.text: Why is scanning useful for IELTS Reading questions?

choices.text: it helps locate specific information quickly
it only works for essay questions
it is not useful at all

questions.text: What type of information is scanning best for?
Which skill complements scanning when answering reading questions?

description: True / False / Not Given darsi bo'yicha test.

questions.text: In "True/False/Not Given" questions, what does "Not Given" mean?

choices.text: the information is not mentioned in the text
the question has no answer category

questions.text: What does "True" mean in this question type?

choices.text: the statement matches the information in the text

questions.text: What does "False" mean in this question type?

choices.text: the statement contradicts the information in the text
the statement matches the text exactly

questions.text: What is a common mistake test-takers make with "Not Given"?

choices.text: assuming it means false when it's simply not mentioned

questions.text: What strategy helps with True/False/Not Given questions?

choices.text: comparing the statement carefully with text and checking for assumptions

description: Matching headings darsi bo'yicha test.

questions.text: What does a "matching headings" task require you to do?

choices.text: match a heading to the correct paragraph

questions.text: What is a good strategy for matching headings tasks?

choices.text: identify the main idea of each paragraph first
focus only on the first word of each paragraph

questions.text: Why might a heading list often contain more options than paragraphs?

choices.text: to test if you can distinguish similar-sounding headings
it is always equal, never more

questions.text: Which part of a paragraph often helps identify its main idea?
Why is paraphrasing skill important for matching headings?

choices.text: headings often use different words than the original text
paraphrasing only matters in writing tasks
